query: SELECT ac.competenciaId, ac.peso, DATE(ac.microInicio) as inicio, DATE(ac.microTermino) as termino, c.nome as compNome FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.id = ac.assessmentPdiId JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ap.alunoId LEFT JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Bruno Martins%' ORDER BY ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ac.competenciaId, ac.peso, DATE(ac.microInicio) as inicio, DATE(ac.microTermino) as termino, c.nome as compNome FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.id = ac.assessmentPdiId JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ap.alunoId LEFT JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Bruno Martins%' ORDER BY ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino;
